content.text:
[cron:312834f3-7eb7-4219-8451-5079e444871c otto-draft-check] Check Outlook Drafts folder via AppleScript for any unsent agent-created drafts. Send reminder to Polly via acp.
Current time: Friday, April 10th, 2026 - 3:00 AM (America/New_York) / 2026-04-10 07:00 UTC

arguments.command:
osascript -e 'tell application "Microsoft Outlook"
  set theDrafts to every message of drafts folder
  set output to ""
  repeat with msg in theDrafts
    set output to output & "SUBJECT: " & subject of msg & "\n"
    set output to output & "DATE: " & (date of msg as string) & "\n"
    set output to output & "---\n"
  end repeat
  return output
end tell'

arguments.command:
osascript -e 'tell application "Microsoft Outlook"
  set theDrafts to every message of drafts folder
  set output to ""
  repeat with msg in theDrafts
    try
      set subjectStr to subject of msg as string
      set dateStr to (date of msg) as string
      set output to output & "SUBJECT: " & subjectStr & "\n"
      set output to output & "DATE: " & dateStr & "\n"
      set output to output & "---\n"
    end try
  end repeat
  return output
end tell'

arguments.command:
osascript -e 'tell application "Microsoft Outlook"
  set theMessages to every message of drafts folder
  set output to ""
  repeat with i from 1 to count of theMessages
    set msg to item i of theMessages
    set subjectStr to subject of msg
    set output to output & "SUBJECT: " & subjectStr & "\n"
    set output to output & "---\n"
  end repeat
  return output
end tell'

arguments.command:
osascript -e 'tell application "Microsoft Outlook"
  set theDrafts to every message of folder "Drafts"
  set output to ""
  repeat with msg in theDrafts
    set output to output & "SUBJECT: " & (subject of msg) & "\n"
    set output to output & "---\n"
  end repeat
  return output
end tell'

osascript -e 'tell application "Microsoft Outlook"
  set allFolders to every folder
  set folderList to ""
  repeat with f in allFolders
    set folderList to folderList & (name of f) & "\n"
  end repeat
  return folderList
end tell'
